title: N11 Review Scraper Input
description: Collect product reviews from N11 into a normalized Turkish review dataset with built-in sentiment tags.

searchQuery.title: Search Query
searchQuery.description: Search N11 results and scrape reviews for the top discovered products.

platforms.title: Platforms
platforms.description: Marketplaces to aggregate reviews from. Only N11 is currently supported.

maxReviewsPerProduct.title: Max Reviews Per Product
maxReviewsPerProduct.description: Maximum number of reviews to emit per product.

minRating.title: Minimum Rating
minRating.description: Only include reviews with a normalized rating greater than or equal to this value.

proxyConfig.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfig.description: Apify proxy configuration. Residential Turkish proxies are recommended for production runs.
